response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong full-stack and distributed systems expertise with exposure to AI-agent infrastructure, but lacks direct executive leadership experience in fintech or regulated environments. His background in agentic workflows and event-driven systems is relevant, though not at the scale or risk profile described in the role.
strengths: Hands-on experience with AI-agent infrastructure (e.g., MCP code generators, agentic workflows at re:cinq)
Proven track record in building and scaling event-driven, distributed systems (e.g., GISCollective, Sociomantic)
Strong technical breadth across languages, frameworks, and domains (web, mobile, embedded, fintech-adjacent)
concerns: No explicit executive leadership experience (e.g., CTO, VP Engineering) or track record scaling teams from 10 to 30+
Limited fintech-specific experience (e.g., credit systems, real-time risk modeling, regulatory compliance)
Agentic AI work appears more prototypical (e.g., GISCollective) than production-grade for high-stakes financial applications
